tasks.title: Implement Transcriber class

tasks.notes: Auto-detect Hailo, fall back to faster-whisper tiny int8

tasks.title: Implement silence/squelch detection
tasks.notes: RMS energy threshold (500), skip silent chunks

tasks.title: Implement audio_router.py
tasks.notes: WAV header construction, chunked HTTP response

tasks.title: Implement /audio-stream Flask route
tasks.notes: Streaming WAV with 0xFFFFFFFF size

tasks.title: Implement SDR disconnect recovery
tasks.notes: check_sdr_connected() polls rtl_test, detects unplug/replug, auto-recovers with restart(), error banner in UI

tasks.title: Implement rtl_fm crash recovery
tasks.notes: sdr_health_loop auto-restarts up to 3 times on process crash, retry button in UI via /api/retry endpoint

tasks.title: Implement browser audio reconnect
tasks.notes: audioPlayer error handler reconnects after 2s with 'Reconnecting audio...' status. Already implemented.

tasks.title: Implement Hailo NPU fallback detection
tasks.notes: Hailo init tries VDevice+HEF loading, catches exceptions, falls back to faster-whisper CPU. Already implemented in transcriber.py

tasks.title: Create setup.sh installer script
tasks.notes: 9-step installer with hailo_platform symlink and model download

tasks.title: Create requirements.txt
tasks.notes: flask, flask-socketio, numpy, faster-whisper, eventlet, torch, transformers

tasks.title: Implement Hailo NPU inference pipeline
tasks.notes: mel.py + transcriber.py rewrite: VDevice/InferModel API, encoder HEF (10s input), iterative decoder (32 tokens), repetition penalty, tokenizer decode. download_models.sh for HEF+npy assets from S3.

tasks.title: Add AGPL-3.0 license and attributions dashboard
tasks.notes: LICENSE file (AGPL-3.0), dashboard/attributions.html with full dependency table, copyright notices, license compatibility note. README updated. .nojekyll added for GitHub Pages.
